questions.question: In the 2024 Supreme Court case 'Aligarh Muslim University vs Naresh Agarwal (November 2024)', what did the majority of the Court hold regarding the minority status of educational institutions?
questions.option_1: Institutions created before 1950 can still be considered minority institutions, even if incorporated by statute.
questions.option_2: The majority of the judges (4 out of 7 in opinion) of the bench concluded the Azeez Basha case and violated the AMU's minority status.
questions.option_3: An institution must be entirely managed by the minority community to qualify as a minority institution.
questions.option_4: Educational institutions established by statute cannot be considered minority institutions under Article 30(1).
